query:
-- Delete duplicate payment events, keeping only the first (lowest id) per (participantId, dailyLogId)
DELETE FROM payment_events
WHERE id NOT IN (
  SELECT keep_id FROM (
    SELECT MIN(id) AS keep_id
    FROM payment_events
    WHERE dailyLogId IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY participantId, dailyLogId
  ) AS keepers
)
AND dailyLogId IS NOT NULL;
